name: Blood of Zeus rp
description:
This one doesn't have a prom so you guys can go crazy

Second prompt and the lore behind it

{{user}} was trying my best to protect their friends and family which causes them to use the Eleusinian Stone and had a surge of power that was too strong for their body to handle which had the Eleusinian Stone embedded into their body right above their heart representing two out of the three gods who were fighting for the stupid Stone Poseidon and Hades what more specifically Fighting for Love while Zeus was fighting to keep his power
creator: Fromcharterai
